title: Haematopoietic progenitor and lymphoid differentiation from human pluripotent stem cells
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"dpdj6","text":"This protocol includes a step-by-step guide to haematopoietic progenitor differentiation, and T and B cell derivation from human pluripotent stem cells.\r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"q642e","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f6ebp","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"mho8z","text":"\r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"lu3fl","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ddbft","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"vyfyb","text":"Link to the Protocol: \"Step-by-step guide\":http://www.nature.com/protocolexchange/system/uploads/6281/original/Protocol_Exchange_-_Vo.docx?1513885899","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Differentiation of haematopoietic progenitors from human embryoid bodies (hEBs)
Lentiviral Infection of Human Embryoid Body-Derived Haematopoietic Progenitor Cells (hEB-HPCs)
Culturing Human Embryoid Body-Derived Haematopoietic Progenitor Cells (5F cells)
Differentiation of Human T cells on OP9-DL1 Stroma
Differentiation of Human B Cells on MS-5 Stroma
